name: safe-coder
description: Safe Coder is a configuration package for the [`pi` coding agent](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent) that adds **safety guardrails** and **project-specific** extensions to reduce risky operations while you code with an AI assista
